subject: 5 reasons to attend AWS Summit India Online
body:
Last chance to register for this free event that's helping tech teams be more productive.
https://email.awscloud.com/MTEyLVRaTS03NjYAAAGiAbX2zh2N5yUUObbtLNbWagk2P_ito7ACUY-6TPxb_qxKadrRvKG1QEXasDv7h7IhHLFMLFA=

Your final opportunity to register
--------------

AWS Summit India Online on June 3, 2026 is your opportunity to dive deep into AWS service architectures, implementation patterns, and production-grade solutions. This complimentary technical conference is built for engineers, architects, DevOps practitioners, and ML engineers who want to master AWS infrastructure and services.

Register now for 1 days of cloud architecture and AI deep-dives, live demos, and technical sessions covering everything from container orchestration to distributed AI systems.
--------------

Register now 
https://email.awscloud.com/MTEyLVRaTS03NjYAAAGiAbX2zh2N5yUUObbtLNbWagk2P_ito7ACUY-6TPxb_qxKadrRvKG1QEXasDv7h7IhHLFMLFA=
--------------

5 ways this event will help your workloads

1. Breaking AI product launches
Hear Madhusudan Rao, CTO, Swiggy reveal how organizations are deploying advanced AI systems that scale and get early access to new AI capabilities.

2. Technical sessions
Master the latest in cloud architecture and AI through practical sessions designed for technical teams looking to enhance their cloud and AI capabilities.

3. Interactive Expo
Get hands-on experience with AWS’s latest technology, test advanced AI models, and experiment with new tools alongside technical experts.

4. Technical certification pathway
Fast-track your or your team's technical expertise with focused preparation for AWS's most advanced certifications.

5. AWS Partner spotlight
Discover how leading technology partners are building sophisticated solutions on AWS and learn about proven implementation patterns.
--------------

Register today
 https://email.awscloud.com/MTEyLVRaTS03NjYAAAGiAbX2zh2N5yUUObbtLNbWagk2P_ito7ACUY-6TPxb_qxKadrRvKG1QEXasDv7h7IhHLFMLFA=

subject: What we're working on right now
body:
Howdy,

Wanted to share a little about Beekeeper Studio's development process, what we're currently working on.

First - we're aiming to do monthly releases for new features with small bug fix releases sprinkled inbetween. Our last release (5.7.1) was on April 29, so the next release is planned for the end of May.

New features currently in development:

  • Snowflake support
  • Edit history for saved queries (both locally and in cloud workspaces)
  • MCP server for local AI agents
  • Multi-hop SSH connection support
  • Workspace permissions for folders, queries, and connections & multi-level folders

Some of these will land in the May release, some will have to wait unti June, we don't like to release half-baked features.

If you want to help us decide what to work on next, please file an issue on GitHub or reply to this email and tell me. The Beekeeper Studio app has zero usage tracking or call-home capabilities, so we only learn about you from your issues, emails, and comments.

Thanks for using Beekeeper Studio,

Matthew

 

Need the app? Download it here. Don't like these emails? Unsubscribe here

subject: ARUNACHAL ‑ HIMALAYAN ESCAPE Ex Guwahati
body:
EGH038

 ARUNACHAL   HIMALAYAN ESCAPE

 Ex Guwahati

 Duration: 7 Nights/8 Days

 Places Covered: Guwahati   Tezpur/Bhalukpong   Dirang   Tawang  
Bomdila   Guwahati

 Frequency / Tour Date: Weekly (Every Friday)

 Package Price: Rs.45,630/  Per Person on Double Occupancy

 Book Now
<http://lt.ncmailer.irctc.co.in/irctc_p3/lt.php?id=ZB9RUlVUUgYDAE5UAAZWUVQPVR8=B1VXVwYNA1NKCAJMUQgODw4FEFVfWEYFU0ImAwhZDQ8eBQsL&client=27>

 Package Inclusions 
 
 • 07 nights accommodation in comfort hotel.

 • Meals in MAP (Breakfast & Dinner as per Night Stay).

 • Transportation charges.

 • All sightseeing as per the itinerary.

 • Travel Insurance

 • Inner line permits.

 • Road toll & Parking fee.

 • Tax, GST, etc

 Contact Us: 

 IRCTC Regional Office   Guwahati

 Shanti Complex (2nd Floor) G.S. Road, Bhangagarh, Guwahati  781005
(ASSAM)

 Mob.: 8595936716/ 8595936717/ 8595936696/ 8595904075

 Email id: tourroghy@irctc.com

 Online Booking : www.irctctourism.com <http://lt.ncmailer.irctc.co.in/irctc_p3/lt.php?id=ZB9RUlVUUgYABE5UAAZWUVQPVR8=B1VXVwYNA1NKCAJMUQgODw4FEFVfWEYFU0ImAwhZDQ8eBQsL&client=27>

 | Download Tourism App

 Opt-out <http://lt.ncmailer.irctc.co.in/irctc_p3/lt.php?id=ZB9RUlVVVQUBA05UAAZWUVQPVR8=B1VXVwYNA1NKCAJMUQgODw4FEFVfWEYFU0ImAwhZDQ8eBQsL&client=27>

subject: We have removed one of your Pins due to our Community Guidelines
body:
We recently removed a Pin related to self-harm from your movies board.
            
            Our Community Guidelines on self-harm require Pinterest to limit and/or remove content that displays, rationalises or encourages self-harm, including suicide, self-injury, eating disorders or substance abuse, as this content can be triggering or reinforce harmful behaviour for those in our community.
            
            If you believe that this Pin was removed in error, you have 6 months from today to submit an appeal.
            
            If you or someone you know is struggling with any of the listed topics, please know that there are resources available to support you. The following helpline provides confidential emotional support in your area.
            
            Sneha Suicide Prevention Helpline
            Visit website for open hours
            Online Chat
            Call
            Website
            
            If this helpline isn't what you're looking for, additional free and confidential resources are available online at any time.

Update Your KYC Information
Hi Binancian,
We’re writing to remind you about an important update required for your account.
 
To ensure the continued security and compliance with regulatory requirements of your account, we need you to update your KYC (Know Your Customer) information.
Update KYC
 

What is required from you?

To meet the updated KYC requirements, please submit the additional information through the link provided above.

How does this impact you?

The updated KYC requirement will not affect your current account access. However, please update the additional information to ensure continued access to the full suite of Binance services.

If you have any questions, please read our FAQs or contact our 24/7 customer support team via live chat.

This is an automated message, please do not reply. 
 
 
 

 
Stay connected!

You should only invest in products you are familiar with and where you understand the risks. You should carefully consider your investment experience, financial situation, investment objectives and risk tolerance and consult an independent financial adviser prior to making any investment. This material should not be construed as financial advice. For more information, see our Terms of Use and Risk Warning.

Kindly note: Please be aware of phishing sites and always make sure you are visiting the official Binance.com website when entering sensitive data.

Please tell us what you think

This is my first and only reminder to please complete the Beekeeper Studio User Survey.

If you have ever used Beekeeper Studio, even if you no longer use it, we'd appreciate your honest feedback about what you like and what we could do better.

It's super short, and will take at most 5 minutes to complete.

We don't track you, so please talk to us

The Beekeeper Studio app has no user tracking at all, so surveys, emails, and GitHub issues are the only ways we can learn what parts of the app you like or dislike.

Cool right? That's why you should --> fill out the survey here <--.

One person will win a $100 Amazon gift card

We'll pick one respondant at random to win a $100 Amazon gift card, just as a small way of making the survey more fun.

 

If you have already completed the survey - thank you so much! We appreciate you.

Thanks as always for using Beekeeper Studio,

Matthew
Complete the User Survey
 
Beekeeper Studio, Inc. PO Box 140565, Dallas, TX 75214

subject: Build Android apps in minutes with simple prompts
body:
Email not displaying correctly? View it  
online<https://notifications.google.com/g/vib/AOExmq30jATAAqkSWFhXluj07d0DDFJtYBAxKVL1oM-jW9YjdqKkUssEmCySmOSHmnYCG4k2z6yyFZaA-AhJ202TkG6loogkiAp6TWMl0EHhqoBFkktPpT6mfFm8wyUjTjg3Fuc>

Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AOExmq2TiS9wKwH_vdbMWWT8EhYrgA449rkjcpSAW29wm1RzpzLt2vWgl3UupSMkLXvOOJdPzQJTu_kkibXwvipcZHFb6XrCdak4L9uu-gua4OxIkiXljzp8e4RcucE8_AqdNWvkonKNjGZXUoAHCNeeV4gDkUo>

Build Android apps in minutes with simple prompts

Build in Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AOExmq1wgmEv29QsLyLHjQT3hBUhryIfS6ur-S9Ht9oGSi6_dw8115JWkWkxesBabYGEPLL8ew9KBpQnx-nttjmqyTtiyzxMQSrPp8AtXSk5OfG8XOuUmD8DsZflmVZTBYyg9GkhNjvAntbY5yfDXkhGWZL8e7CdCzLGnMuI0anPOhi4no9c_wdBEtHlGeHsJ87F-LywNW6vjTkNFA>

Hi Nayak,

At Google I/O, we launched updates to Google AI Studio and the Gemini API  
so you can create apps with deep Google ecosystem integrations and build  
powerful production-ready agents in minutes. Check out what's new!

Google I/O  
Image<https://c.gle/AOExmq3mJks9mcMPOab3YJ3bb0R59HfHNoDPxlEd4qET_Mikwy0gg-kO-BF-vYPoGqbTccXOBUVoH6UHrsZ-Psyisuo1eGPwQjI7CrRlCuggOOpHtC70YB0zkljEs6YXkdfn-5Uq4jhYHY1m98NYDmOrNZ8W8JZkLp_4TrXjao95KcqIRM3HpBUc>

Catch up on Google I/O announcements

Watch the keynote  
replay<https://c.gle/AOExmq2o3eGbzgWv7VkKLXAYMii6XhoyxR3IQT5Qdlff-6oRbcEXCXmJB5KCXIqDCscbEZOsVdhiUqrMD_bII__JDqgVALR8DH58Hv_dRtla2obSNUe6AIya7ZSKsRs8_CLYcY4BYBn0bKxgRfD0VozhLUGqEB2UJ3Kr3NSg8PeR7HfyM6vxQZys_SiXfT4wjvSW-X9fxvO7ceXzdQ>

AI Studio  
Build<https://c.gle/AOExmq3u7s2FTdnqkxkyRlX36B4arpNq7FALO7GXn-nzNB4qo1tzGFLY1cS_6FHXfyokrOTlnNYSWG-SBz9wSTFfeQVFhxIAKGXS5S120hCITBz_ThY5SbbH20NF2ZPBBr9US5d5rD-IGXwLPMC5Vr7ThjPpvRRsEQIo15CoL2tADS9OOkd2NJ6-KdnAI_RL1i-lbhc>

Build with managed agents

Prompt native Android apps, integrate with Google Workspace and  
Antigravity, and keep building on the go with the new mobile app.

Gemini  
API<https://c.gle/AOExmq2eNdPAq5jvfZhMRcseIC9MbXzsYANfS7hTwkTVgCLvJ1oxmIsvZJJ4tT6Howv7MdBkNIKLQb7QM3jEtzKlasbcc2EoPOwLNqAcvBibsbUkpurc4lWOpXP4iELXJO6iIApyBYWAwdpbvYN5Z4vUTjSfS_Hzo-6jzGeTCWXRsIbzhBTHXeu5VFzIQejnpVAF86aSqBsIfcVAyWFFamVkVu4r2JIQaKPcGRSi3P8>

Build native Android apps

With a single API call, spin up an agent that reasons, uses tools, and  
executes code in an isolated, ephemeral Linux environment.

We’re putting the full power of agents directly into your hands, no matter  
what you are building.

Logan Kilpatrick, Google DeepMind

AI Studio  
Build<https://c.gle/AOExmq273MekIwOyFUW09ELQxNjQjYo-ms1deTjCwpb8NuMqo8yyKPUirpKUG81C8Vmefb1BUR6YzU70rVjlu693d8Xxfxt3P9arkcya8V54sZ6SbqdMFsIHeKrlXtDSuhgR_knZN93UOmlo1aqfbhVb5EcdokuRHn1sLXqcI0qXu3tmbe005eLgPUW7pP9aaSAwn1w>

Build Android apps in minutes

Describe your idea and let AI Studio generate production-quality Kotlin  
code using the latest Jetpack Compose patterns. No need for SDKs or local  
environment setup.

Screenshot of a dark mode UI showing an AI assistant prompt to 'Describe an  
app and let Gemini do the rest,' with 'Build an Android app' selected as  
the current  
task.<https://c.gle/AOExmq2kChMmYSH6K61RxtERJfuhtFSIGNlExbHb9Rm73sL2DpV1IIhtRXXP8CmUZP9EuIqVNi_KsuCYPyT_ANy3cYd54HItR7_GTHW4paucARByXCT_eCjkTnyaA-RI-1sBQSAC_KnbpVYLSCVw_O44vuwAkEENHBAP8lsYnur1wcAzbDWuybCUY54YiJPgd1Y>

One-click Google ecosystem integrations

Play Store  
Icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq00qQIEnpNNNrOrw28g3ySdGdVESxdZI_4o7oKOeeThnCox3CgHp-gbQxvlzxonNO5T-NPfoJridZWTQAUYUZxzrsmtYihZLMvPV9JuSGeXAJtIhS3D7mdEUDvrrSfuFWYSHL_zzTBZv4Wq0hOvceR4WaYgNGIy4EnIuGSDn0ZH9W1CwJDo9pZxKSnDUI54tBQ>

Direct-to-Play test track publishing

Connect your Google Play Developer account in AI Studio to publish your app  
to Google Play's Internal Test Track with a single click.

Google workspace  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq2O9BRdcUv9ws6rNaIUTLTxVMV37sxnwtsZsUj1PbJHJrilpL8C2YNqN4jXryca248miLYwXIhaQblVsngGY0UHYbjSU9JkxK7sQV22Yb5YKR7s16z-R4pabuyL7UDldImIYCG68Y7zc2FzhNQ-Y-OGnVdRzsfF5Kk0klE>

Direct access to Google Workspace

Build dashboards on top of your Sheets data, create tools to organize your  
Drive or spin up apps that work with the documents.

Antigravity  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq0i6ZZYRqW6fZ0752WpHomakt_eqHy1uHwNlTy4zG2ORwjbLFokt__f7HPzSHYfq2Stw24zNr_r5dX0267BPZejRavGVgIUgVLcJpLbw8zolFBWHEQnPa7JgetdCu0nayeXmEL5I5TayqUSYJZWKPpS10NbMSJz>

Export to Antigravity

Take your conversation history, project files, and secrets with you. Pick  
up where you left off, invite your team, and start scaling your development  
workflow.

Cloud run  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq3vzN26SIT3x0FZKIwF_HByRNr1pfC9bowbYdebHIMKZ8vGm9M_3D7aT_pCgEA2xrc3m2_xAY9T5gqZvOPieOmZX4q_GgXLkaeUA8_H1qMNEuJZ4DvV6Gb-lrwO0xt20nNWZZPaiaQJvN6_0eIRPPvqFEKmEw>

Deploy to Cloud Run

Deploy your first two apps to Cloud Run at no cost with newly  
billing-enabled projects. No credit card required.

Start building in AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AOExmq0hRnFxRHePs8yii50i4ZUK1Oa-KcVM1hzME2uKbHnrZlZSNBCHTbmFNjrwharnqlft_eAAtLaNoEisvdGggm7kSuX4F9rihxpsuty6gTE3dtbh5h_Vrv0np9uvL3LlCdajtWeZ5iZ1UcYyangMDXQwhlrwHR1KP34xbF7H8Za->

Pre-register for the AI Studio app

Great ideas don't just happen at your desk. That’s why we’re putting the  
full AI Studio Build experience in your pocket so you can start on your  
phone and seamlessly pick up where you left off on your laptop.

Google play  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq0AnC3fb9qZ4gIS_HqfJ6zFkk8NMncxkJt3BDvVpZhMDDtIJAomizlnB20jKJm3DdUsx9_-2JojbVb7oEYRLf1QRYLOdffuOhra0XpsLy-XhQfcXHvJGd7F1Mfg2gyKlqNxWFTso3TelIa4ag4J1inBGes9JALyCtIINcjATieuiItajI9g1FZiu0nCfzVtBb6O5Xt6mgP7aPnMH5uRuuk>

App store  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq1O9FitB_EKvyVVn0D_2H2JPxManUO4m8ZIDI9s_MJ3K4hq4JgEPMVxzGPnruN2Fam-FHod_EvR-SBmtiQJRfEPbsKXCWDuhgm6fBgUO9dgmN0e_uqVcvnkftUhjGgLB7wErG6960gUiPMu5c3DbxqhAQ>

Gemini API

 From prompt to production-ready agents with a single API call

Now you can build and deploy managed agents using the new Antigravity  
agent, available in preview in the Gemini API.

Agent stack  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq2eQNV5WTqXJX5kqSJ5wo4jbvYewXpGsWUl9SPjQ1isfS4G-yihOMvbUFF6IvTx6AvY_1Kes_OWog1GQ-MASG-DsLCqtBFahhZ-LXBz1DhUzeb82R2m2o6VEbrdpcl3vkfuRLaOnqO5gF34H8Sglejb9l2IVRIIwQcuGCH9xaGTyivc>

One call, full agent stack

We handle the infrastructure. You focus on the user experience. A single  
API call provisions an agent with a Linux sandbox, code execution, web  
browsing, and file management.

Google agent's  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq0UijBegIcnSOlGv9Ywrpog-DIhwsniGE4T0rA0xdVbuBdMxmR61wwpUsEza1rzjWlBdV0hp1TDkx7WYm60LSnT9IG3VcRCKG8Dt_0USZfUyt67tXfb8OGJjPLS1RwFG2gePYzPbjCdvrt3QnUS1iC_pQQZR8ona9c8Ac4ndNJ1Y-c-jiQ>

Google's agent harness

Co-optimized for Gemini models and the same harness that powers Google  
Antigravity and other first-party agent products.

Define agents in files  
icon<https://c.gle/AOExmq0J-z4SmN5UzrLeK77s9pE9CivgNj3skAjomZL6PV5xxNwXLcmqaQEkXEbn81RmyA0xot4S7JZDxECgNtLz0wOAvv8PB8RfPXWjargJ9CrQCwAbZESg9uWxcnHvEL5mdAsXCc0DFvKNiODVCNIEvvdH3s3fFDvi4EbG7R6GZxkVVa_dSHKCuIzQ0lRErPQ>

Define agents in files

Write your instructions in AGENTS.md and skills in SKILL.md, register as a  
managed agent, and call it through the Interactions API.

Try it in Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AOExmq0QabqKm6AWBuz-P0QTny9se9sfe80IbQZFYtHDOP9e8679ecUWKlUuLeAHJg3VMLFvFPXzdJdFAn0CBnIMhbIXZYZHdR0ETiNocwQOBHOov5YjZOVAq6OgsbpxT1Gy-OJ7-jZVGdZFEr8uO-SKE-aBjOtahIcthdd_OBWrPBVWfg>

Happy building,

The Google AI Studio Team

© 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

This email was sent to nayakomkarcontact@gmail.com because you signed up to  
receive emails about Google AI. If you do not wish to receive these emails,  
please  
unsubscribe<https://myaccount.google.com/communication-preferences/unsubscribe/gt/AOExmq2k3fOU7Fd2Cn9beDGEOeQT76peR3x9iGwlHve6UqJePw8kUsRFPZGP9jb7s0E2A03rvoqVdjxEwkm0BrdcEF1LWoHrAhe2J71pjFuBUDh5uNGvOpMt63hgEuRf-oPnbfwx1RN5m6KEytgMQnfFLUsQzy4O9DaTkzZwJTb1HcmKSmcle9Ph42waVeyd0ZUg429bdqj4nwJIzihLFxKJJOR5W5l_GxbFB2XjeQnLyTzwcg93kfp_6g?utm_source=gm&utm_medium=email&auto=true>.

subject: Introducing Groww Prime: Your mutual fund investing guide
body:
A personal investment guide awaits you ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
   
    
     
      
       
        
        
         
        
        
        
         
          Introducing
          Groww Prime
         
        
        
        
         
          When you downloaded Groww, you decided to invest. But, choosing the right fund isn’t always easy
          “Where do I begin?”
          “Which funds are right for me?”
          If that sounds like you, don’t worry. It’s normal to feel that way.
          That’s why we built Groww Prime , to help you choose and invest in mutual funds with personalised recommendations.
         
        
        
        
         
        
        
        
         
          Smart Invest
         
        
        
         
        
        
         
          Have an amount in mind? ₹5,000 monthly or ₹10,000 one-time? With Groww Prime, we will suggest funds that fit you, based on your budget, risk appetite, and goals.
         
        
        
        
         
          Prime Verdict
         
        
        
         
        
        
         
          A simple rating isn’t always enough. Prime Verdict tells you if a fund is best, good, average, or poor, based on its consistency, risk, market performance, and fund manager impact.
         
        
        
        
          EXPLORE NOW 
        
        
        
         
          
           
            
             
              INDIA'S NO.1 STOCK BROKER
              Loved and trusted by 1 Crore+ active investors
             
            
           
          
         
        
        
        
         
          Follow us yet?
          Our social is a treasure box of finance content.
         
        
        
        
         
          
           
            
             
             
             
             
             
            
           
          
         
        
        
        
         Groww Invest Tech Pvt. Ltd.
        
        
        
         Registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park, South Tower, 3rd floor, Sarjapur Main Road, Bellandur, Bengaluru, Karnataka - 560103. You're getting this email because you're a Groww user and we believe you deserve great finance content and the latest updates from us. However, you have the option to unsubscribe. Or if you need help? We're here for you.

Mutual Fund investments are subject to market risks, read all scheme related documents carefully. Past performance of the schemes is neither an indicator nor a guarantee of future performance. subject: Connect your vibe-coding workflow to Figma
body:
Welcome to our first Workflow Lab: a series of
step-by-step guides to bring AI into your existing workflows across Figma and
beyond.

Up first, going from code to canvas with Figma’s MCP server
[https://www.figma.com/resource-library/what-is-mcp/?fuid=1562594326565264086] .
You might have vibe-coded a prototype locally, but what about sharing? You need
a way for your team to react, refine, and collaborate together.

Follow this workflow to get Figma MCP set up with you AI agent, push prototypes
into Figma, and back to production-ready code. 

Read the full guide
[https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/40219873508247-Workflow-lab-Code-to-canvas]

Code to canvas in 4 steps 

Set up Figma MCP
[https://static.figma.com/uploads/a8e009dc861a592877ff0dcc87d854fe3992ce6c]https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/40219873508247-Workflow-lab-Code-to-canvas

1. SET UP FIGMA MCP

INSTALL FIGMA’S MCP SERVER
[https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/35281350665623-Figma-MCP-collection-How-to-set-up-the-Figma-remote-MCP-server],
THE BRIDGE BETWEEN FIGMA AND YOUR AI TOOLS THAT LETS AI CODING AGENTS UNDERSTAND
AND MAKE CHANGES TO YOUR FIGMA FILES.

Bring production UI into Figma
[https://static.figma.com/uploads/59ba16e985d5e09c6bd01dc712367e0b14e84fa3]https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/40219873508247-Workflow-lab-Code-to-canvas

2. PUSH PROTOTYPES TO FIGMA

RUN /PROTOTYPE-TO-FIGMA
[https://github.com/alima-max/prototype-to-figma-skill/tree/main] ON YOUR LOCAL
PROTOTYPE TO BRING EACH SCREEN INTO FIGMA AS EDITABLE FRAMES USING YOUR DESIGN
SYSTEM.

Map code variables to Figma
[https://static.figma.com/uploads/f01bd8cdb1a9717b668fc37e49e575efc93ced9f]https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/40219873508247-Workflow-lab-Code-to-canvas

3. REVIEW THE PRODUCT FLOW TOGETHER

BRING EACH STEP OF YOUR PROTOTYPE INTO THE FIGMA CANVAS SO YOUR TEAM CAN SEE THE
FULL FLOW, COMPARE APPROACHES, AND MAKE DECISIONS IN ONE SHARED SPACE.

Send changes to code
[https://static.figma.com/uploads/871efb531fda60d66be765d847c5e26c4a3e46f4]https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/40219873508247-Workflow-lab-Code-to-canvas

4. SEND CHANGES TO CODE

PROMPT YOUR AGENT TO UPDATE THE PROTOTYPE USING THE LATEST FIGMA DESIGNS, SO
WHAT YOUR TEAM APPROVES IS CLOSER TO WHAT SHIPS WITH NO NEED FOR A MANUAL
HAND-OFF OR REBUILD.

Figma is a design platform for teams who build products together. Born on the
Web, Figma helps the entire product team create, test, and ship better designs,
faster.

760 Market Street, Floor 10
San Francisco, CA, 94102 Unsubscribe [https://track.customer.io/unsubscribe/dgT6uQkLAJiQzgKXkM4CAZ4_HBuJQ7swjlIv1UAUDQ==] from Figma
marketing emails.

Tell us how to make the app better

We need your help! We want to keep improving Beekeeper Studio in the ways that matter to you, but to do that we need your feedback.

Please complete our 2026 survey. I promise it's short, it'll take you less than 5 minutes.

Here's the link to the 2026 user feedback survey

Reasons to spare 5 minutes.

Yeah yeah, I know lots of companies want you to complete surveys, but there's some really good reasons why you should complete this one:

  • Beekeeper studio does not track you. So this is the only way we can learn about your usage patterns.
  • We're a small indie team, so your feedback will be read by us directly to help us improve the app.
  • We have over 2.5 million downloads, so providing feedback helps a whole community of people who are working with databases.
  • Because, erm, it's a nice thing to do? It is.
  • Oh, you could win a $100 gift certificate, that's pretty dope.
Beekeeper Studio User Survey
 
Beekeeper Studio, Inc. PO Box 140565, Dallas, TX 75214
View web version - Unsubscribe

You're one step away from AWS Summit India Online
----------
AWS Summit India Online is coming up on June 3, 2026 - and there's still time to register for this complimentary event.

You'll find 50+ sessions designed to help you master the latest innovations in AI, machine learning, and cloud infrastructure while growing your knowledge of security and data.

Don't miss your chance to experience:

- Build and optimize advanced architectures using Amazon Web Services(AWS)'s latest tools for AI, ML, and cloud infrastructure.

subject: New Roadmaps, Newsletters, and the Future of AI
body:
Introducing AI Weekly and DevOps Weekly newsletters to keep you ahead.

View in browser (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlKl5m_5PW7lCGcx6lZ3nFVN3Rp63zVg5PW6NKzlx86Q-jTW12XQQK5YG5X6W6c-jWp8_5m1pW5mg4n_2v9Q3qW8_0qxQ5SmgFnN2W1m-4DVwLWW75fV711St3bbW1chDX07cdPSyW1DyBgZ7H_skkW4pCD-Y76ZgTPW6yPJmt3y_PLDW5YDMj3310bZRN3tkcqxbnk0XW6XqqNG76y6jZW1q6_Kq4KQVD7W1tbTjW10zXBjW3b8SHK21jh0BW48pvst56vrkDW5nlGpq8cKCpMW8VFDkj5qpz3sW3vpXJL7d7MHwW8S_4Mg2YPnVsW73hcCp57X4TDW4KwSh17GRX6tW7Htw9K4cZR8jVKwp-p1KB0HQW5vj3fL6mxMk1W98qmSD5-QrwmW3z6YH79bR62bW8Rcwkl4315q8W4FYXX15301VFVnNCY93yPwFLMHL0xBB1lXHW1NQmRY2C2gz3W3xJHq48zYSkbW1NnPY_2WqRfPW5vkvl37BQNm6W7s1-CS86_7z0W3Hlpk86JTXkYf2Z0Gcl04 )

roadmap.sh (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlJM3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3n6VN51gQ85Ld8YW1q4hBj7PFs7pW4_V_cz3kKRS7W2QLpkW5GMnd_W9181r27QGjzZW3cNt5_8wd_c8Vfy5q57lDM8nW5LB-LJ2Cp-tjW5PP8gv5_qZ_WF8vNsqFn-0mVlwJk86jVTjZN1vnQp28YC1DW5yfbpf33kkdSVxytLL58zNkNW4sKKv-1LsSL8W53KtJ33MKCgPW3HrBFV3m4Q6xVCRTGB3MN9hWW6MWtk-4qBkF3VLYgbl116-5Zf9fFvtY04 )

Hello there,

Kamran here from roadmap.sh. We’re focused on improving the platform and giving you exactly what you need in these uncertain times.

AI is rapidly changing the IT industry; mastering the skills is essential, but staying ahead means knowing exactly where the market is heading next. To stay ahead, we’ve launched our first two newsletters: AI Weekly and DevOps Weekly.

We're also expanding! Our latest update adds two highly requested guides: Network Engineer (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlK23gP0xW6N1vHY6lZ3mfW6k0HN11CNB5jW8Smf3T6x9mhDW57jcTm5PGqtnN2zDcTl1hnx7V3f7Nw2hk5KrW7CkDy05JY5l_W96Q27q81-4fDW8DSTbX4QCSSnW65KRVB7jF9lFW8cvSYz4hS3FTW4b81N0582hZvW59fzS-1SmpnqN5LbSL9vCM2zW8YBJRt5_4FG-W7t8nfN2KmtYFVbyZfv4PGHpxN2v6m2XRxMKYW8f_NhY11KgsNW5vlXhb4Fn74jN7LzKvCVPv07W6TKLLr5tBH3rW1BhgF01S9STNf2WwS5q04 ) and LeetCode  (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlJM3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3kNVPRV9t8v7GrjW2yByj01pWW7dW81DhVj7YGSt7W6mh0tB2lD-LBW1G2GlS57Dm3-W1N9b1r8yNLYSW3nMMJc7KTSkRN2Y6X6wSQ-LNW55Y94J58tk-JW4XFq6T2v0bzdW2mbpJV3L-Rn0W7K39dD7dh8K-W8XS1kb50fyFtW2cb0lW3bg9ggW7vry018dYvSGW6f6W1g7YLf9dW33HshH2CYtPRW3rXPt24b7_TLW150R8f22QQ-qW3xMhv53DD2qPdBV8z-04 ) roadmaps.

Don't forget to check out our new series of Python guides (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlJM3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3nXW71bds538JzCmW58Pyy_4xGvGJW35B6Tw5HjJ3CW7QSVw986jGMlW87WX7z47GmgkW2RNzf33Wxm_rW7xbSjD8Ff_6fW3TNcMb2-_qLZVfqH4T7QcvBNW3lF2cS3kYz25W7xc79y4_YnVxW3zMGQC7LGqJ8W4-CHcN1WG2b9W3V_qh42vdtS-N9lTgvqlnnPzW4Gx9j01YfQf1VsQ8ZG1csLdDW6l_gN5946n7fW5Skhtq3l4tXKVMhmJq3sH6Kmf890DB204 ) — well worth a read!

Two Weekly Newsletters

We’ve been working hard all year to make weekly newsletters a reality, and the results are finally here. While building a great resource from scratch is no small feat, we’re proud of the momentum we’ve built.

The AI Weekly and DevOps Weekly are officially up and running, delivering the critical insights you need to stay sharp in an ever-changing industry.

If you haven’t received them yet, access your favorite roadmap and click on the Weekly Newsletter button at the top of the page to sign up.

network-engineer-roadmap (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlK23gP0xW6N1vHY6lZ3mfW6k0HN11CNB5jW8Smf3T6x9mhDW57jcTm5PGqtnN2zDcTl1hnx7V3f7Nw2hk5KrW7CkDy05JY5l_W96Q27q81-4fDW8DSTbX4QCSSnW65KRVB7jF9lFW8cvSYz4hS3FTW4b81N0582hZvW59fzS-1SmpnqN5LbSL9vCM2zW8YBJRt5_4FG-W7t8nfN2KmtYFVbyZfv4PGHpxN2v6m2XRxMKYW8f_NhY11KgsNW5vlXhb4Fn74jN7LzKvCVPv07W6TKLLr5tBH3rW1BhgF01S9STNf2WwS5q04 )

Network Engineer Roadmap

Networking fundamentals are the most underrated skill gap for modern developers. We just launched the Network Engineer Roadmap, covering a structured path from basic terminology through protocols, the OSI model, and network devices.

Explore the Roadmap
(https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlK23gP0xW6N1vHY6lZ3mfW6k0HN11CNB5jW8Smf3T6x9mhDW57jcTm5PGqtnN2zDcTl1hnx7V3f7Nw2hk5KrW7CkDy05JY5l_W96Q27q81-4fDW8DSTbX4QCSSnW65KRVB7jF9lFW8cvSYz4hS3FTW4b81N0582hZvW59fzS-1SmpnqN5LbSL9vCM2zW8YBJRt5_4FG-W7t8nfN2KmtYFVbyZfv4PGHpxN2v6m2XRxMKYW8f_NhY11KgsNW5vlXhb4Fn74jN7LzKvCVPv07W6TKLLr5tBH3rW1BhgF01S9STNf2WwS5q04 )

NewRoadmap_16x9_AvailableNow (18) (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlJM3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3kNVPRV9t8v7GrjW2yByj01pWW7dW81DhVj7YGSt7W6mh0tB2lD-LBW1G2GlS57Dm3-W1N9b1r8yNLYSW3nMMJc7KTSkRN2Y6X6wSQ-LNW55Y94J58tk-JW4XFq6T2v0bzdW2mbpJV3L-Rn0W7K39dD7dh8K-W8XS1kb50fyFtW2cb0lW3bg9ggW7vry018dYvSGW6f6W1g7YLf9dW33HshH2CYtPRW3rXPt24b7_TLW150R8f22QQ-qW3xMhv53DD2qPdBV8z-04 )

LeetCode Roadmap

Learning how to solve technical interview problems can feel disorganized, but this LeetCode roadmap moves away from random "grinding" and instead organizes LeetCode challenges into a logical sequence of data structures and algorithmic patterns.

Explore the Roadmap
(https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlJM3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3kNVPRV9t8v7GrjW2yByj01pWW7dW81DhVj7YGSt7W6mh0tB2lD-LBW1G2GlS57Dm3-W1N9b1r8yNLYSW3nMMJc7KTSkRN2Y6X6wSQ-LNW55Y94J58tk-JW4XFq6T2v0bzdW2mbpJV3L-Rn0W7K39dD7dh8K-W8XS1kb50fyFtW2cb0lW3bg9ggW7vry018dYvSGW6f6W1g7YLf9dW33HshH2CYtPRW3rXPt24b7_TLW150R8f22QQ-qW3xMhv53DD2qPdBV8z-04 )

new-python-guides (https://updates.roadmap.sh/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VW1tPB4g4QdYW8FKDb-7KkqBJW2NZxg55P58S-N4gTlJM3gP0xW69sMD-6lZ3nXW71bds538JzCmW58Pyy_4xGvGJW35B6Tw5HjJ3CW7QSVw986jGMlW87WX7z47GmgkW2RNzf33Wxm_rW7xbSjD8Ff_6fW3TNcMb2-_qLZVfqH4T7QcvBNW3lF2cS3kYz25W7xc79y4_YnVxW3zMGQC7LGqJ8W4-CHcN1WG2b9W3V_qh42vdtS-N9lTgvqlnnPzW4Gx9j01YfQf1VsQ8ZG1csLdDW6l_gN5946n7fW5Skhtq3l4tXKVMhmJq3sH6Kmf890DB204 )

New Python Guides

subject: The Good Hour | Log Off, Touch Grass 🪵🌱
body:
Issue #03 - Go offline and get out there  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­­‌ []

[skillshare](https://click.skillshare.com/z/h92u835b0rwy04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=1)
The newsletter
for creative humans
and their brains.
[View in browser](https://click.skillshare.com/email_browser_view?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&eid=e1a2c678-9923-1918-d5ca-123b47d8e5ea&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=2)

Issue 03
Going
Analog

[Sam Hockley-Smith, Guest Editor]
Hello From the Editor
It’s 2026 and everyone on the internet is talking about the hot new trend of not being on the internet. If you’ve somehow managed to avoid this conversation topic, congratulations! You’re probably offline already. We’ll give you a brief rundown: after years of total digital saturation, nonstop news updates, and barrages of wall-to-wall information, people are turning to the natural world to find community, have new experiences, and generally take control of their lives. It’s an admirable goal, but it’s also kind of tricky. We’re so intertwined with our digital worlds that even halfway extracting ourselves can pose a challenge.

This installment of The Good Hour can hopefully help you take some of those steps, getting you off social media so you can focus on the act of creation instead of consumption. We’re convinced that there’s a happy middle ground between terminally online and using the internet in a healthy, productive way. Hopefully we can help you get at least part of the way there.

– SAM HOCKLEY-SMITH, GUEST EDITOR

Inside

1
We Tried It
Refresh your workspace this spring
[]

2
New/Now/Next
Why everyone's heading offline
[]

3
Q&A
How Kelly Bren Burke turned analog inspiration into digital magic
[]

4
One Small Practice
Play with mixed media in Procreate
[]

5
Final Thought
Going analog is hard — start simple

We Tried It

From vintage film to digital hybrids, these are some of our favorite point-and-shoots.
Some links in this email are affiliate links, which means we may earn a commission if you make a purchase.

[Fujifilm Quicksnap](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hy228k5o0po804?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=3)
Fujifilm Quicksnap
Why we like it: In the pre-digital camera days, these things offered up a quick and easy way to capture life moments, without having to worry too much about carrying an expensive piece of equipment around with you. In this case, this isn’t, like, a remake of an old disposable camera, it’s just that same thing, still trucking along. Still doing good work. Still requiring you to find a place to get the film developed. At this point they’re kind of a novelty, but they were popular for a reason, you know?
Why it might not be the right fit: You don’t have a place to get your film developed. You have no nostalgia for the past at all.
Verdict: At around $20, you can’t really go wrong. Plus, you’ll see your friends and loved ones in a whole new light when you do eventually get the photos developed. Why not give it a try?

[Purchase](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hy228k5o0po804?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=4)

[Camp Snap Screen Free Camera](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hs2o8g560pjx04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=5)
Camp Snap Screen Free Digital Camera
Why we like it: Down with perfectionism! The preview screens on digital cameras are helpful for seeing in real time what the photo you just took looks like, but they can take you out of the moment. This screen-free camera asks you to trust your intuition and take a picture without being able to immediately know how it’ll look. Just like the ancient times of the 1990s.
Why it might not be the right fit: You fear the unknown. You are a perfectionist who didn’t like that we said “down with perfectionism.”
Verdict: There are a billion reasonably priced digital cameras on the market, but not many of them can change the way you think about photography like this one can.

[Purchase](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hs2o8g560pjx04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=6)

[Sony ZV-E10](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hd2p8g510c5304?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=7)
Sony ZV-E10
Why we like it: There’s a fairly reasonable chance that your first camera was actually the camera on your phone. But if you’re ready to level up and spend a bit more cash than the other picks on this list, this Sony camera will allow you to create both video and still images with relative ease.
Why it might not be the right fit: It’s comparatively pricey and it’s got a bit of a steeper learning curve, but once you get the hang of it, your output will be high-quality.
Verdict: This is an investment that will grow with you, so if you’re feeling confident about sticking with photography this is a great next step.

[Purchase](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hd2p8g510c5304?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=8)

[Fujifilm Instax Mini Evo Instant Film Camera](https://click.skillshare.com/z/h92b805108vp04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=9)
Fujifilm Instax Mini Evo Instant Film Camera
Why we like it: So much of going analog involves rejecting stuff you’ve gotten used to. Not this camera! You’ve got the convenience of digital, the design of vintage film cameras, paired with the thrilling novelty of an immediately printed photo, direct from the camera.
Why it might not be the right fit: By standard camera prices, it’s not exactly expensive, but it’s not really very cheap either. The instant photo printing capability is fun, but may not feel like a necessity later on.
Verdict:If you’re looking to reinvigorate your love of photography, you’ll have a blast with this camera.

[Purchase](https://click.skillshare.com/z/h92b805108vp04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=10)

New/Now/Next

[A photo of a hand in grass]
For the first time, the group chat was quiet. Did everyone leave? Find new hobbies? What happened? It turns out [Brick had happened](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hs2c8l5z0g1t04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=11), and the real world was where they went. If you’re unfamiliar: Brick is a handy, low-profile device that sticks to a fridge or wall. Tap your phone against it, and it’ll bar you from using any app you tell it to for the amount of time you tell it to. Think of it as a non-sentient friend who is just looking out for your best interests, if your best interests happen to involve being online a whole lot less.

Looking at the popularity of Brick alongside the popularity of “dumbphones” aka old phones without internet capabilities, or ones like the [Lightphone](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hm2e8e520ftj04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=12), which allows for some apps, but keeps social media off your phone, and everything on your phone in black and white, it’s clear that we’re collectively yearning for IRL connection and experience. We recommend any of these devices, depending on how and if they can fit into your life. Even if none of these align with your exact needs, we encourage you to take their purpose to heart and block those sticky social apps — at least for a little while.

Q&A

[collage art]
Skillshare teacher Kelly Bren Burke found her digital calling while working in a very analog world. When she got her first iPad in 2017, she was managing a Barnes and Noble, spending long days at the store with no time to devote to art. But that iPad changed everything: she downloaded Procreate and took some Skillshare classes that taught her how to make collages — a traditionally analog medium — digitally.

"I can trace everything I do now back to those early Skillshare experiments, and to one unexpected afternoon where I clicked on a class just because it looked fun," she says.

Her fluid approach to thinking in analog ways about digital creation is inspiring, so we thought we’d resurface [a profile of her](https://click.skillshare.com/z/h42m8z5t0h8004?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=13) we ran at the beginning of this year. It’s not only a great guide to finding your artistic calling, but it’s an insightful look at how to bring your dreams into reality through methodical education and consistent drive.

[Check it Out](https://click.skillshare.com/z/h42m8z5t0h8004?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=14)

One Small Practice

[Prompt]
Skillshare teacher Lisa Bardot’s [Analog Meets Digital: Fun Mixed Media Illustrations in Procreate](https://click.skillshare.com/z/ht2s8d5s0jry04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=15) class is a celebration of the way analog and digital mediums can collide and generate new dimensions of your artistic style, acting as perfect inspiration for this week’s prompt. This one’s a bit more labor-intensive, so you’ve got twenty minutes.

Begin with a piece of paper and an illustrative utensil: pens, paint, charcoal, whatever you want from the physical world. Draw semi-abstract textures, shapes, or marks. Nothing too detailed or too fancy. Just let it flow.

Then scan or photograph your analog piece into Procreate, and use its digital tools to transform your piece into something entirely new.

https://click.skillshare.com/z/ht2s8d5s0jry04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=16
Analog Meets Digital: Fun Mixed Media Illustrations in Procreate

[Take the Class](https://click.skillshare.com/z/ht2s8d5s0jry04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=17)

Final Thought

[A top down photo of a person's hands cutting paper with a ruler]
Before we leave you for the week, we wanted to acknowledge the practical difficulty of going analog. It’s easy to envision, but not so easy to execute. Being online is, at this point, just part of life. Even learning an offline skill, like many of the ones we offer on our platform, requires — you guessed it — getting online, at least for a little while. We recommend jumpstarting your creativity with a quick and breezy class like [The Sketchbook Fillers’ Club: Four Powerful Guidelines for Stunning Spreads](https://click.skillshare.com/z/he2r83590l2v04?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=18), which’ll get you off your screen and onto the printed page in mere minutes.

See you next time!

Your analog era starts here — plus 20% off

From watercolor to collage, explore hands-on creativity with Skillshare.

[Join Now & Save 20%](https://click.skillshare.com/z/hk2j8o5607h204?uid=6b5b0b9b-18e7-4de4-9436-d19646883fc4&txnid=ee2db45a-a597-4ebb-80fe-8d04cd3268fa&mid=1b65b430-09aa-4139-91d5-ad18b98095f7&bsft_aaid=d5edc627-0f6f-46e0-b492-6ae0d9cbe64a&bsft_ek=2026-05-15T19%3A13%3A48Z&bsft_mime_type=text&bsft_tv=4&bsft_lx=19)

subject: Google Maps Policy Reminder
body:
Hello Nayak,

This is a reminder that contributions to Google Maps must follow our  
policies:

• Our Terms of  
Service<https://c.gle/AOExmq2Etg6wR3IDHPk9jc4eHvdF8OgALGh3sJjgUSDHlTyuEUckKd3p9qLy9nO0GtqITS3q_rrkT37NyQi4N_ejj1BImN53B9AHyjf_f73giCOoNr-RzmFrWpcAromcjJKJc3ZuNFDLgm-tBKP7OLIpYSrJIckehS_q_Xsqrz8>  
explain what you can expect when using Google services, and what Google  
expects from you.

• Our Privacy  
Policy<https://c.gle/AOExmq2oqOoT3PkcUIO8i2m2NO_pyqdKwvSGDwDPwrRlZ0jkADMm9hHjhmbxVdmIOBGxULB7KBLZuCd24hkXaXmmvpBoOMrUKEGQC6z2otCENlMAGHz8tyIinExriROr7mw67R5VT8f1_haPdYh0P_pm6FTCxpo>  
explains how your information is handled. We work hard to protect your  
information and put you in control.

• Our Maps User-Generated Content  
Policy<https://c.gle/AOExmq19WKDY4DPJi8o192974mu1f-kTgmJ1vB_V6YZ2qXzjx-ZKR2klDPMFCR6gNHKJGT7udu1m6ZVsiuVqik-fh_m508JnSmkMOqu7ifQ9w_6M-Zzgrf9MpzNbVHwNBGjN1-eQOHEevU6Rl0FgcFL29l-lGOvuTOwd4x3cJ_u3sy1jkzp8--JdlyMlQyIujZX4leNLmGtMPhXMKSJFVqnmnWP9mHxMKfaKYBG51WXIMHT3O3ho9XsN_9NtYmH5hJSD3s_UR6rlCJhczN5ax7l-x41ukru-i4sV>  
is designed to keep content on Google Maps trustworthy and reliable.

Not following these terms and policies may result in removal of your  
content or restrictions on your account. Your use of the platform is also  
subject to the Indian Information Technology Rules of 2021 (as amended)  
(ITR). We are required to remind users that violations of the ITR may have  
legal consequences. Additionally, we may be required to report certain  
illegal content, synthetically generated or otherwise, to the appropriate  
authorities. This mandatory reporting includes content that violates the  
Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 or the Protection of Children from  
Sexual Offences Act, 2012.

Here are a few tips for contributing to Maps:

• Post genuine reviews: Reviews posted in exchange for a payment, deal or  
discount are prohibited.

• Share helpful media: Avoid heavily edited photos and selfies, which are  
less helpful for people trying to decide where to go.

• Report inappropriate content: If you find  
content<https://c.gle/AOExmq2edtizyk6EikUYX-UG8w54iNEtN0TS1dMuI9Jwb6_oUNwibRmMMOWtpr5BVpeBPtaaszOcbl4W2E-uuDPbQZ6H_LZqNr81hFS8wW3lDlpzMEJODQ1mVPBwH9PUyE2TGUFZ4aaY0Qfb_6cxbIEh3tf-2G3BL-lzQXPUqiWktzONawVkW80>,  
a user  
profile<https://c.gle/AOExmq1zvLeJ18EE18rycKQdyaP71kmqrH2NQvgWMVuled6dU9C4OIb7KyOgRED_6tdjvY2MKJ1ykjwgSvOSkukCHp5Y8Lk0oRrGtv9XLoZc1Rd8Ue2jBRsZ5lwKM7X4vfGLo-J8Fb4pmOxU64rR99wSswFBp4D5U9jzAFCHzoxEmdSd_D6p0EJD_wgl-Q>,  
or a business  
listing<https://c.gle/AOExmq3ubAMuq6DSKK3xcwTIs-j2DfkAzWscGAG3CWZ213FDNQouTqx7yOWz-_hoFuP_69LnK5HuVTEXMsi8sFWb0fg1lffDqcjTt0r_gcLFWSx8YGv-Au_15WcVX59dF-t5QGD6n2m49tFEq7EL4eYJ-RXLGFWjeBHxSdef6nFOKdElKed_HD8Whiu5xA>  
that you believe may be violating our policies, please report it.

• Beware of scams: Watch out for messages or phone calls from people you  
don’t know offering money in exchange for leaving a review. Learn  
more<https://c.gle/AOExmq2_U9cYU2EAC-7uinOUTuZNuXM4tpPYkUET9jro-eW_7WoFNvDOpDnPAq7HR9pcXhRld8k0IYimej0R2-H6HISgVCSSoHeRgjeVFaV4m9zU8pguJ6SqNJ-1Wsr1XOWuSdpOqef8Mg1iUWnSNEZyW2pM73Z6jB_rWtA8CH02j7tT-4vzjA>

Thank you,

The Google Maps Team


You received this email because you contributed content to Google Maps.

(c) 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

subject: Close Clients Faster with Outbound Proposals on Dribbble

Introducing Outbound Proposals on Dribbble

 
You can now send your project scope, timeline, and cost directly to clients—all in one place. Your client reviews the details, submits payment, and the project kicks off securely on Dribbble.

SEND A PROPOSAL ( https://email.n.dribbble.com/c/eJysUsuOnDAQ_BpzQTsyNuZx4JAM4paHlA9Axu7ZccYPZJpZ7d9HnoWEkXLck63qUnV1dSvpZmlePRFf9-9oNBF9V_C2rcs2OzDASWPHZZ1-g8LEOduwQH62Bjwu-SAXhJi_GbzmP1acwup1_jOGOSzSLnnweR_NNE0WjqJzDElu9NJB0vwfJ4Iyc2oy6uCk8Yn3msycVHBH4id7Q3CzlQh_zT0V3-cH9h3eFguIEI_Vu4xGogkPr-fgMQab6U5XrGZVBl1R101DW8FEdu1aySsOSlSKtqqhom41Z2WlL1I3UjU0Mx2jrKKiELQoBRMnYE1V8wutigvnk76QkvqT3kZ4pGK7K-K8EP6FsIGwQcfJnownbLgRNmxy5biHMf4Cr_dACB9WdOMS1qiA8P4OMRBWJcyBNqsjvH8cwwaq4BE8Et6rj0l3fM-D94wy8dTwW9rjBw0hJsVDkLHz8l3egrvJmCSlQlLSfyvHLlnanpftVF8KwUXDy-zesT8BAAD__6aj9fQ )

 

Take control of your client workflow with a process designed to protect your time and your income.
* Zero Platform Fees: Keep exactly what you earn.
* Secure Payments: Payments are held securely until the work is completed and approved. Dribbble supports flexible payment structures.
* Boosted Visibility: Every completed project actively boosts your profile visibility on Dribbble, helping you land your next big client.

 

 

READ THE FULL FEATURE GUIDE ( https://email.n.dribbble.com/c/eJysUsuO3CAQ_Bp8sXaEwfhx8CFZyznlofyAhaG9Q4aHBe1Z7d9HzM4kjpJjTqDqUnV1dSvpNmlePBEfH9_ZaCLGoeJ939Z9cWCAk8bOaV9-gMLMebYhQflsDXhM5SQTQixfDZ7LrzsuYfe6_BbDFpK0qQy-HKNZlsXCUXSLIcvNXjrImv_iRFBmy01mHZw0PvNespmTCu5I_M_eENxmJcIvc38U37Yb9gVekwVEiMfqVUYj0YSb1-fgMQZb6EE3rGVNAUPVtl1He8FEcR66FfpO6ga6SulF0BVWaBfaNbxuZaegMAOjrKGiErSqBRMnYF3T8pU21cr5oldSU3_S9xFuqdjhjLglwj8QNhE26bjYk_GETRfCJkaZoKKq50cY83eQ-tNuNBA-7ejmFPaogPDxCjEQ1mTMgTa7I3y8XcIdVMEjeCR8VO9jPvBHGHz8q9vnvMR3GkLMiocU4-Dlm7wEd5ExS0qFpKa_941DtnR_nu53-lQJLjpeF9eB_QwAAP__eXv1Tw )

Ready to close more projects?
Clients hire for impact, not just aesthetics. Update your portfolio with comprehensive case studies and real client results so prospects can easily hire you for their next project.
 
UPDATE YOUR PROFILE ( https://email.n.dribbble.com/c/eJysUsuOnDAQ_BpzQTvyAwNz4JAM4pZkLzkjYzc7zviBTDOr_fvI80iIkmNOtqpL1dXVrZVflH0LRH5-fkdriOw7Jo7HpjoWOwZ4Zd24btMP0Jg5JxdXKE_OQsC1HNSKkMp3i-fy24ZT3IIpX1Nc4qrcWsZQ9slO0-RgL7qkmOXGoDxkzX9xEmi75CajiV7ZkHlv2cxBR78n_mdvCH5xCuGXuT-KH8sN-wrvqwNESPvqVSWr0Mab11MMmKIrTGdq3vC6gI41TdvSo-SyOHea6llzNtecGqYbLfSklJGatzPTlagK23HKayqZpKySXB6At3UjZlqzWYjJzKSi4WAeI9xScd0ZcVmJ-ET4QPhg0uQONhA-XAgfOOWSSlaNzzDG74tRCK8pztYBEcOGflzjljQQ0V8hRcLrjHkwdvNE9LdreIA6BoSARPT6PuoTfwYi-r86fsmLvNMQUlbcJZm6oD7UJfqLSllSaSQV_b1z7LKlx_PyuNUXJoVsRVVcO_4zAAD__2ot9uk )

subject: Customer expectations have changed. Are you keeping up?
body:
73% of consumers prefer messaging when communicating with a business. How is your company meeting this growing demand?

At our upcoming Conversations conference, Meta leaders and industry innovators will reveal what’s next for AI-enabled business messaging, how consumer trends are transforming customer engagement, and how you can stay ahead.

Register now to watch the keynote live online on June 3.

[Register to watch Conversations](http://events.atmeta.com/conversations2026-virtual-english/C26-EN-WAB-email-email_invite-Email_Invite-Global--Clients-Email3?content_id=p4fT5lB5rUGUzSW)
P.S. To learn more about what today’s consumers expect—and what’s informing our messaging and AI roadmap—check out the [2026 State of Business Messaging Report](https://business.whatsapp.com/resources/resource-library/state-of-business-messaging) today.

Source: Business Messaging Usage Research by Kantar. (Meta commissioned online study of 11,056 online adults in US, FR, DE, UK, ES, IN, MX, BR, ID, TH, VN, MY, PH, CA, AR, CO, TR, SG, KSA, UAE, NZ, and AU, April/September 2025).


You are receiving this email from the WhatsApp Business Platform team. To stop receiving emails like this, you can unsubscribe or update your notification settings.

[Unsubscribe](https://business.facebook.com/settings/preferences?business_id=1255135593478694) [WhatsApp Legal](https://www.whatsapp.com/legal)

© 2026 Meta. Meta Platforms, Inc., 1601 Willow Rd, Menlo Park, CA 94025

Getting organized is easy

Yes it was a long time coming, but finally you can organize your connections and queries inside of Beekeeper Studio.

Folders are available right now in Beekeeper Studio. Download here.

Workspaces get folders too

If you share queries and connections with other people using a Workspace, you can also benefit from folders. Folders can be created in both the 'personal' and 'team' roots and they work the way you'd expect.

Coming soon

We're working on even more organization-improving features, including multi-level folders, item & folder permissions, and a query edit history.

Tell us what you want

Beekeeper Studio has zero user tracking. So we have no idea what you're doing in the app. That means if you want us to do something, you have to tell us! Respond to the email to let us know.
Download Beekeeper Studio
 
Beekeeper Studio, Inc. PO Box 140565, Dallas, TX 75214

subject: Session catalog live - AWS Summit India Online
body:
Master cloud and AI technologies at AWS Summit India Online.
https://email.awscloud.com/MTEyLVRaTS03NjYAAAGhuYANdO90YMb-o49S3kIM4OXdqAL9OWMlWIHdV9PrWVznTu20tXcGeN4mq_p-sNP3_XIe6x0=

Your AWS Summit day starts here
----------

The session catalog just went live – start building your personal learning journey. Here’s an overview of what you will experience at AWS Summit India Online:

 - 50+ Sessions: Learn customer success stories, discover innovative cloud and AI solutions, and interact live with AWS experts.
 - Interact with AWS experts: Participate in the live Q&A with AWS experts to gain a deeper understanding of AWS' solutions.
 - Hands-on learning: Enhance your AWS Cloud and AI expertise through hands-on learning, demos, and expert-led training.
----------

Browse the session catalog 
https://email.awscloud.com/MTEyLVRaTS03NjYAAAGhuYANdO90YMb-o49S3kIM4OXdqAL9OWMlWIHdV9PrWVznTu20tXcGeN4mq_p-sNP3_XIe6x0=
----------

With keynotes, hands-on technical sessions, interactive learning opportunities, and more, you’ll discover the exciting world of AI and grow your cloud knowledge. Plus, get your specific technical questions answered by AWS experts.
------------

Plan your agenda

The Community Guidelines  
<https://c.gle/AOExmq0YdusYgnDsoLJDWUBz6iEbaVfS2q6Ar72LzsHi3K_a6hLZmZXIXSpxBcTvAUyoYcAZbZ7DM-ljxIvwOUas3dPHLKoGN9uVqDin8Q10Rk_Gs3MiCLSKF4VNHM0bkFQNdYM0-rNsS6cJHVX4Xc0wmzI9PolI6HoR86w2SkKHP0hXQTANvrlH_zBGhK0p7PRiVocMZ7bWiNtq>,  
which are part of our Terms of Service  
<https://c.gle/AOExmq2u802y4gztjWYEVqJS472ZvY9ni0V_T1VlETdcvWwE0DexVQcS__n1E__G9TIvZ6Tzz1sSr8KQTmMkxJdgswmtMiXQmrlZmeD-q7kcGOcj5RN1BiI8HvI8DndhnWwcH4IocIQ4su9A8niWiL9z>,  
aim to make YouTube a safer community while giving creators the freedom to  
share a broad range of experiences and perspectives. The Community  
Guidelines outline what type of content isn’t allowed on YouTube. These  
policies apply to all types of content on our platform, including videos,  
comments, links and thumbnails. In addition to Community Guidelines,  
creators who want to monetise content on YouTube must comply with  
Monetization Policies  
<https://c.gle/AOExmq09rbH379onzd_2Colg_SJr1TvUARdDqmA2l0-Al8ed_TmZARVpmOph7h5o0O_45HlaN-EM43ySKKpUfN5cjtyymgXKvgo3Xa2cR2Lbv0SwffUJf9oPt74pAH6sURWII0hwj4FwbD7tXQq1ypdjRyno8OiV4INcRlhlnhNCikbI-L6wl1qmgsDFLhtlnlDbn4wcr0rBGg9XTB2l>.
By way of due diligence as an intermediary, we also take this opportunity  
to remind you to comply with applicable laws such as the Indian Information  
Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules,  
2021 (as amended) (the “Rules”). The generation, modification or  
publication of unlawful synthetic content such as deepfakes, non-consensual  
intimate imagery, etc is prohibited under the Rules. Violations of these  
terms or applicable law may result in warnings or further action including  
content removal, loss of access or termination of all or part of your  
account. Certain offences may be reported to authorities.
